title: Team-member closeout: Charcoal Brazing Kiln (7c7327) — post-M1-merge prep; Cycle Alpha LANDED in 340752bb; Cycle Beta scope-transferred to Seaworthy's post-merge tidy plan; all claims closed; ready for final piece
body:
Team-member closeout — Charcoal Brazing Kiln / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `7c7327`.

Running team-member-not-closeout-owner path per `session-handoff` SKILL §"Team Member, Not Closeout Owner" per Mistbound directed event `e8d1c27b` relaying owner direction: *"restart monitors then run session-handoff to prepare for the final piece of work (Seaworthy's post-merge tidy plan)"*. Director Seaworthy holds session closeout authority.

## Boundary owned this session-resume window (12:35Z compaction-2 resume → 20:27Z post-merge prep)

PR-108 Sonar acceleration lane (Implementor seat under Director Seaworthy): owner-authz Sonar config edit + Cycle Alpha cure bundle + reviewer-fan-out synthesis + Cycle Beta substrate (paused mid-claim → scope-transferred).

## Outcome

### Substrate landed (in PR-108 merged at `2462952a`)

| Commit | Substance |
|---|---|
| `79c148e4` | `chore(sonar): exclude generated api-schema from cpd (owner-authz exception)` — Director-routed `73f9c57f`; sonar-project.properties +16/-1 |
| `340752bb` (Cycle Alpha within bundle) | `fix(sonar): mechanical S7735/S7755/S7765 cures + S7787/S7727 false-positive markings` — 6 files / +10/-8 LOC / 5 cure-types / 7 sites; reviewer-converged code-expert PASS-WITH-NITS-ABSORBED |

### Substrate stood down

- **Cycle Beta** — S5443 × 14 fixture-discipline replacement + consistency sweep. Reviewer-converged pre-pause (code-expert `af7b0338079198b3e` PASS; security-expert `ac025ad946e546bee` VERDICT-PRESERVED-LOW-RISK). 21 `/tmp/→mem://` sentinel replacements applied; 531/531 tests green; marshal-request body drafted at `/tmp/charcoal-marshal-request-mistbound-cycle-beta.md` but **never filed** (team-wide pause hit at 14:59:58Z; Director direction *"pause mid-claim if open"*). Working-tree substrate discarded during branch-shift to `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs`. Scope transferred to Seaworthy's post-merge tidy plan per Mistbound DM `e8d1c27b`.
- **Cycle Gamma** — `resolveSelfIdentity` extraction + `**/eslint.config.ts` cpd-exclusion. Not started; sequenced behind Cycle Beta; transferred to post-merge tidy scope.

### Reviewer fan-outs completed this window

- PR-108 inventory fan-out (4 reviewers; synthesis broadcast `a15363e5`): code-expert + security-expert + test-expert + architecture-expert-fred + config-expert (PASS-WITH-FOLLOW-UP on sonar.cpd.exclusions edit)
- Cycle Alpha review: code-expert PASS-WITH-NITS-ABSORBED
- Cycle Beta review: code-expert PASS + security-expert VERDICT-PRESERVED-LOW-RISK

## Evidence (key events authored this window)

- `5cb294ba` — direct to Seaworthy: substrate-pointer-pattern v2 18th-19th instance correction
- `8ac52536` + `8dd35cee` — sonar.cpd.exclusions marshal-request + Director architectural-honesty observation
- `a15363e5` — broadcast: PR-108 reviewer-fan-out synthesis (5 un-routed finding-classes surfaced)
- `6e53aef5` — broadcast: sonar.cpd.exclusions landed `79c148e4`
- `625fb072` — marshal-request to Mistbound for Cycle Alpha (~75m overdue at pickup; processed post-compaction-4-Mistbound)
- `c0a22b6c` — team-start (post-compaction-4 resume)
- `9a0ec4a8` — directed ACK to Mistbound naming Cycle Alpha claim ownership (resolving Mistbound's `c27ba21a` enumeration question)
- `b62d7bfc` — Cycle Alpha landed broadcast
- `0a4f1a4a` — Cycle Beta pause-ack broadcast
- `cf0191dc` — pre-pause final heartbeat-end

## Claims / queue / git state

- **Claims under (Charcoal / `7c7327`)**: ALL CLOSED. `ccfef0a5` (sonar config edit) closed in window 1; `abf7f94a` (Cycle Alpha) closed at 14:54:54Z on landing; `f610d430` (Cycle Beta) closed at this turn via scope-transfer.
- **Commit-queue intent**: NONE (marshal-requests via comms-event substrate, not commit-queue).
- **Branch**: `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs`, HEAD `bf3a8152`, 0 ahead of `origin/main`. Cycle Beta working-tree substrate discarded during branch-shift; reviewer convergence evidence preserved in transcripts.
- **Working tree files I own**: NONE (post-branch-shift).

## Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted

Pre-pause final heartbeat-end at `cf0191dc` (15:00Z). Cron `ade15ea3` stopped at that time via CronDelete. This closeout broadcast pairs with cron `abd493eb` (re-armed at 20:27Z post-pause-lift); cron will be re-stopped if owner directs further pause OR allowed to die naturally with session.

## Retained claims

NONE.

## Pickup notification required for follow-on agent

NO — same-identity continuation likely if Seaworthy's post-merge tidy plan needs Charcoal-class implementer work. If a different-identity successor picks up, no pre-pickup-read obligation: my boundary is fully closed (Cycle Alpha landed in `340752bb`; Cycle Beta scope-transferred). Substrate-pointer is this broadcast.

## Surprise or changed understanding

- **Mistbound silence pattern resolved as marshal-seat watcher silent-failure mode** — Mistbound's 95m / 75m / 85m overdue acknowledgements at post-compaction-4 resume (14:36:23Z / 14:36:33Z / 14:36:44Z) explicitly named the failure mode and thanked my pre-compaction-3 napkin capture for surfacing it. Substrate-pointer-pattern v2 working as designed (pattern fired at ≥20th instance this session window).
- **Owner-direction supremacy on OUTCOME not LITERAL form** — Mistbound's `cd4efc15` 3-commit-split (heterogeneous tree split-by-attribution) and `340752bb` single-bundle commit-all both worked: owner direction *"commit everything"* applied to the durable substrate outcome, not the literal one-commit form.
- **Owner-authz exception substrate** — my Director-routed sonar.cpd.exclusions edit landed with architectural-honesty cure-shape (action the directed cure AND name the substrate truth/redundancy inline at the change-site, not just in the routing event). Pattern candidate for second-instance pending-graduations review.

## Blockers or risks

- **None at my boundary.** Cycle Beta scope-transfer to Seaworthy's post-merge tidy plan is clean — reviewer convergence preserved in transcripts; the substantive cure (21 site `/tmp/→mem://` replacements + plan rationale) can be reconstructed from the marshal-request body at `/tmp/charcoal-marshal-request-mistbound-cycle-beta.md` if the post-merge tidy plan wants to absorb it.
- **Marshal-seat-watcher silent-failure mode** is now a known pattern across the team (Mistbound's `c155d0c5` napkin capture E + Twilit's two-cure-shape suggestions); deeper structural cure (durable `last_heartbeat_at` field + PDR candidate) is in pending-graduations buffer.

## Handoff needed

NO from me — boundary fully closed; awaiting Seaworthy's post-merge tidy plan to know whether any future Charcoal-class work is in scope.

Tag: behaviour-note + team-member-closeout + post-m1-merge + cycle-alpha-landed + cycle-beta-scope-transferred + same-identity-standby.

— Charcoal Brazing Kiln / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `7c7327` (Implementor, post-M1-merge, awaiting post-merge tidy plan)
